hero.title:
A bright, cozy
grooming day for your pet
hero.subtitle: Book online, trusted groomers, gentle care — warm, clean, and full of sunshine.

sections.whySubtitle: Professional skill with genuine love — a calm, happy visit every time.
sections.servicesSubtitle: Basic and full packages to keep pets healthy and looking their best.

promotions.title: Limited-Time Grooming Deals
promotions.subtitle: Pick a warm seasonal offer and book your pet's next happy grooming day.

items.title: 15% Off First Grooming Visit
items.description: New customers enjoy 15% off on Basic or Full Grooming for the first booking.

items.title: Second Pet Gets RM15 Off
items.description: Book two pets on the same day under one account and get RM15 off the second pet.

items.title: Boarding + Grooming Bundle
items.description: Add grooming to your boarding booking and enjoy a special bundled rate.

featureList.title: Loving care
featureList.description: Personalized, gentle handling tailored to each pet’s personality.

featureList.title: Professional service
featureList.description: Quality products and proven techniques for consistent, beautiful results.

featureList.title: Easy booking
featureList.description: Schedule online anytime — fewer messages, more clarity.

featureList.title: Pet boarding
featureList.description: Comfortable stays when you’re away — safe, supervised accommodation so your pet feels at home.

featureList.title: Experienced team
featureList.description: Comfortable with many breeds and temperaments, including shy pets.

featureList.title: Low-stress space
featureList.description: Bright, calm pacing so visits feel easy — almost like a sunny walk.
